sections.name: overview
sections.description: Input contract, working directory, rules, and references for VLM enablement.

sections.name: model_analysis
sections.description: Create the static .model_analysis upstream report from installed Transformers/Optimum sources and exported IR, then append the GenAI enablement design.

sections.name: text_only_inference
sections.description: Implement text-only VLMPipeline behavior, compare deterministic output with Optimum, and debug token/template/position mismatches.

sections.name: image_text_inference
sections.description: Implement preprocessing, vision encoding, and embedding merge, then run image-text smoke/comparison tests and debug unrelated output.

sections.name: accuracy_verification
sections.description: Run WWB HF, Optimum, and GenAI accuracy checks and interpret similarity.

sections.name: repository_tests
sections.description: Add tiny-random Python VLM coverage, run a narrow pytest target, and add a dedicated CI matrix entry when model-specific dependencies are required.

sections.name: final_deliverables
sections.description: Final checklist before declaring VLM model support enabled.
